_note: These fields hold the project's attribution and provenance metadata, and are the single source for both outputs: they are stamped into the exported JPGs and injected into the knowledge graph at build time. Only the field names listed here are recognised by the pipeline; any others are ignored, and any left blank are simply omitted (no empty value is written).
author: Hüseyin Erdoğan
affiliation: Alma Mater Studiorum – Università di Bologna
